# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

kind: BackupPolicy
apiVersion: appsphere.io/v1alpha2
metadata:
  name: backup-policy-elasticsearch-ops
  namespace: ops-team
  labels:
    projectID: dev
spec:
  rules:
    - selector:
        matchLabels:
          applicationName: elasticsearch
      repositoryType: s3
  repositories:
  - kind: S3Repository
    name: backup-repository-elasticsearch-ops
    url: https://s3-us-west-1.amazonaws.com/appsphere-dev-operations-backups-2
  # TODO: Implement the necessary restoration configuration here
